disclaimer: AIPOU is experimental, unaudited, has intentionally tiny liquidity, and has no promised fiat value. A provider may decline or counter before accepting work. No purchase, deposit, farming, or claim is required.

acceptedDeliveryMethods: public HTTPS artifact URL with SHA-256 digest

bounties.deliverable: One original 1024x1024 PNG illustrating a human and an AI agent completing useful work while a private cryptographic receipt is created.
acceptance: The image contains no third-party logos or copyrighted characters.
The provider grants AIPOU permission to publish the image on the project website, repository, and social posts with attribution.

bounties.deliverable: One original 6-second seamless 16:9 MP4 loop showing an AI-work receipt moving from a human-agent task into a verified settlement record.
acceptance: The loop is 1080p or higher and has no embedded third-party watermark.
The visual does not imply guaranteed rewards, token price, or investment returns.
The provider grants AIPOU permission to publish the video on the project website, repository, and social posts with attribution.

bounties.deliverable: One original 32x32 pixel-art AIPOU work-receipt icon, delivered as a transparent PNG and an integer-scaled preview.
acceptance: Every visible pixel aligns to the 32x32 grid.
The icon remains recognizable at native size.
The provider grants AIPOU permission to publish the icon on the project website, repository, and social posts with attribution.

bounties.deliverable: One original low-poly GLB coin or receipt medallion inspired by AIPOU, plus a transparent PNG preview.
acceptance: The GLB opens in a standard glTF viewer with materials intact.
The model uses no third-party trademark or copyrighted character.
The provider grants AIPOU permission to publish and display the model and preview with attribution.
